articles.title_en: Russian Military Accuses Ukraine of Launching Drone Attacks From Latvian Airspace
articles.lead_en: Latvian officials said two drones crashed on its territory early Thursday, with one sparking a brief fire at an oil storage facility.
articles.title_raw: Russian Military Accuses Ukraine of Launching Drone Attacks From Latvian Airspace
articles.lead_raw: Latvian officials said two drones crashed on its territory early Thursday, with one sparking a brief fire at an oil storage facility.
